rules.condition: Where the parcel shares a property line with an LRT corridor or street

citation.quote: (a) with an LRT corridor or street, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 6.0 metres; (b) with a lane that separates the parcel from a parcel designated as a residential district, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 6.0 metres; and (c) with a lane, in all other cases, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 3.0 metres.

rules.condition: Where the parcel shares a property line with a lane, in all other cases

citation.quote: (a) with an LRT corridor or street, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 6.0 metres; (b) with a lane that separates the parcel from a parcel designated as a residential district, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 6.0 metres; and (c) with a lane, in all other cases, the setback area must have a minimum depth of 3.0 metres.

rules.condition: above grade at any point along a fence line, for that portion of the fence extending beyond the foremost portion of all buildings on the parcel

citation.quote: 1120 Fences 1120 The height of a fence above grade at any point along a fence line must not exceed: (a) 1.2 metres for that portion of the fence extending beyond the foremost portion of all buildings on the parcel; (b) 2.0 metres for that portion of the fence that does not extend beyond the foremost portion of all buildings on the parcel; and (c) 2.5 metres to the highest point of a gateway provided that the gateway does not exceed more than 2.5 metres in length.

rules.condition: above grade at any point along a fence line, to the highest point of a gateway, provided that the gateway does not exceed more than 2.5 metres in length
